education.title: Education & Background

professional.title: Personal & Professional
professional.summary: Patient, hardworking, solution-oriented and calm. I thrive in collaborative environments and aim for long-term impact across sectors: government, NGOs, education, and private business.

workEthic.title: Work Ethic & Character
workEthic.summary: Known as patient, hardworking, skilled and solution-oriented. Calm and focused, respectful, and professional. Strong teamwork and communication — dedicated to long-term goals and impactful digital solutions.
